nasb.text: Then I pulverized them as the dust of the earth; I crushed and stamped them as the mire of the streets.

esv.text: I beat them fine as the dust of the earth; I crushed them and stamped them down like the mire of the streets.

cnv.text: 我搗碎他們，像地上的塵土； 我打碎他們，踐踏他們， 像街上的爛泥。

ccb.text: 我把他们打得粉碎， 如同地上的灰尘，践踏他们， 就像践踏街上的泥土。
